creator: jmallett@xMach.org
text:
I've been told that this will be put into one of the installation guides
(I forget the name, but it was the one that sparked integration of
scrshot(1) stuff and that whole discussion), by the author of it. The
author of it was not, however, aware of this PR, and it should probably
just be closed.

--
[ Joseph Mallett            <jmallett@xMach.org> ] [ http://srcsys.org ]
[ xMach Core Team         xMach: Proactively Unbloated Microkernel BSD ]
[ FreeBSD, NetBSD, & xMach User; (Obj)C(++) Coder ] [ http://xMach.org ]
